message: www.arealimpia.com.co https://www.zoominfo.com/c/rea-limpia/1332696378 Área Limpia Distrito Capital S.A.S E.S.P provides various cleaning and waste management services including mechanical and manual street sweeping, tree pruning, containerization for waste disposal, and public area washing. The company serves residential and commercial clients, ensuring the collection and transport of non-recyclable waste and maintaining public cleanliness.
